name: openspec-diff
description: Monorepo for the OpenSpec Diff CLI and VSCode extension.

scripts.build: (cd packages/cli && go build -o ./bin/openspec-diff ./cmd/openspec-diff) && npm run build --workspace @openspec-diff/vscode-extension
scripts.test: (cd packages/cli && go test ./...) && npm run test --workspace @openspec-diff/vscode-extension
